title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk UX Overhaul with AI-Powered Troubleshooting
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's cyberpunk UI revamp and AI-assisted problem solving, highlighting the improved editor, Azure OpenAI guidance, and new authentication flow.
core_message: CodeGrind has refreshed its core DSA practice experience with a cyberpunk visual overhaul, a more capable AI assistant, and streamlined sign-in. This campaign highlights tangible UX improvements, real-time AI guidance, and a smoother onboarding flow to reinforce practice impact.
cta: Explore the refreshed CodeGrind experience and try a problem with AI-assisted hints today.
visual_brief: Static hero image featuring CodeGrind UI in a neon cyberpunk aesthetic: updated three-panel layout (Problem Description, Code Editor, AI Chat) with glowing towers visualizing concepts, subtle GitHub/Google sign-in cues, and a prominent AI-help prompt.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
